hero_subtitle: SFTY structures exception handling by linking Travel Rule message data with case workflows and audit evidence to support thorough compliance review of high-risk events.

problem_title: Travel Rule exceptions delay compliance reviews
problem_description: High-risk Travel Rule exceptions often remain isolated outside structured case workflows, delaying timely escalation and review by compliance teams. This separation fragments audit evidence and complicates defensible decision-making for VASPs handling complex transaction data.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exception data, wallet activity and customer records into structured case workflows that escalate high-risk events with full audit evidence for timely compliance review.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures high-risk Travel Rule exceptions, routes them through compliance review, opens cases, preserves evidence and supports structured decision and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond Travel Rule messages. Evidence-ready workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms fragmented Travel Rule data into structured exception cases with linked evidence and decision logs, supporting efficient compliance review and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs handling high-risk Travel Rule exceptions with controlled workflows, evidence preservation and governance aligned to bank due diligence and enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support high-risk Travel Rule exception handling
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule exceptions trigger compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves high-risk Travel Rule decisions

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_1_answer: SFTY centralizes Travel Rule exception data, routing high-risk cases into structured compliance workflows for review and escalation by VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How are high-risk exception workflows handled?
faq_2_answer: High-risk exceptions trigger case creation with linked originator, beneficiary and message data, supporting controlled review, decision logging and evidence collection within SFTY.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-grade logs of Travel Rule messages, exception details, decisions and reviewer actions to support compliance reviews and potential regulatory inspection.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple Travel Rule providers’ outputs into one platform, enabling connected status tracking, exception handling and coordinated compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule systems?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing Travel Rule providers and compliance tools, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying systems.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule exception cases with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects high-risk exceptions, message data, cases and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
